name: FundingArb
tagline: Helping you find arbitrage opportunities in funding rates—scanning funding rates across all perpetual contracts in the market, ranking the exploitable
positive: Helping you find arbitrage opportunities in funding rates—scanning funding rates across all perpetual contracts in the market, ranking the exploitable opportunities from highest to lowest annualized returns and delivering them to you. Perpetual funding rates settle every 8 hours (some 4h, Hyperliquid / dYdX every 1h), with payers and receivers varying by exchange and coin. It lines up the rates for the same coin across Binance, OKX, Bybit, Gate, Bitget, Hyperliquid, and dYdX—these 7 platforms—and directly shows you how to profit from the spread: buy spot on OKX / Gate while simultaneously opening an equal-value perpetual short on the platform with the highest rate, earning continuously from positive funding; or hedge price fluctuations by shorting on the high-rate exchange and going long on the low-rate exchange, netting the funding rate difference. Each entry is clearly marked with annualized returns and settlement cycle. Outliers with absurd instantaneous rates and those with all negative rates that require borrowing coins to short—thin markets, problematic markets, or simply untradeable—are singled out and excluded from the list. No need to upload any parameters; just call once and get the latest report delivered directly.
